name: Alphabet Space Floor Puzzle 28pc - Gigglescape™: Toddler Educational Toy, Kids Problem Solving, Letters & Numbers
description:
Help your little one learn their letters in a fun, interactive way with the Alphabet Space Floor Puzzle from Gigglescape™. This floor puzzle includes 28 self-correcting pieces with animals in a spaceship and the first letter of their names. Designed to be over 10 feet long, they can add pieces to make the puzzle longer or place them in multiple rows to fit the space.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
